home.heroHeadline: Total Security. Total Peace of Mind.
home.heroSub: Custom alarm systems, HD security cameras, and 24/7 local monitoring — built for Houston homes and businesses.
home.servicesSubtitle: Every system custom-engineered for your property. No cookie-cutter packages.
home.service1Desc: Commercial-grade intrusion detection with instant response. DSC, Honeywell, and Napco panels installed and supported locally.
home.service2Desc: 4K IP cameras, PTZ systems, and AI-powered video analytics with cloud and local storage options.
home.service3Desc: Key fob, biometric, and mobile credential systems. Control who enters — from one door to an entire campus.
home.service4Desc: UL-listed central station monitoring with average sub-30-second response times. Real humans, 24/7/365.
home.service5Desc: Protect your family and home with layered security designed for Houston neighborhoods.
home.service6Desc: Enterprise-grade protection for retail, office, industrial, and multi-site business operations.
home.whySub: Family-owned. Licensed. Local. We're not a national chain — we're your neighbors.
home.why1Desc: Born and raised in Houston. We know the neighborhoods, the crime patterns, and the infrastructure.
home.why2Desc: Month-to-month monitoring. No lock-in, no cancellation fees. We earn your business every month.
home.why3Desc: Texas DPS License #B03066901. Fully bonded and insured. You're protected before, during, and after installation.
home.why4Desc: Local monitoring center. Sub-30-second average alarm response. Police dispatch in seconds, not minutes.
home.why5Desc: No two properties are the same. Every system is custom-designed after a free on-site security analysis.
home.why6Desc: We pick up the phone. Local technicians available for service, upgrades, and emergency repairs.
home.step1Desc: We visit your property at no cost. Our experts assess vulnerabilities and recommend a custom solution.
home.step2Desc: We engineer a system tailored to your property, budget, and lifestyle — no upselling, no bloat.
home.step3Desc: Licensed technicians install your system cleanly and efficiently. Usually completed in one day.
home.step4Desc: System goes live. Monitoring begins. You get a walkthrough, app access, and our direct number.
home.faq1Q: How much does a security system cost?
home.faq1A: Systems range from $500 to $5,000+ depending on property size and features. We offer flexible financing and month-to-month monitoring from $29.99/month. Every quote is free.
home.faq2A: No. We offer month-to-month monitoring. No multi-year contracts, no cancellation fees. We believe in earning your loyalty, not locking you in.
home.faq3A: Most residential systems are installed in 4–8 hours. Commercial projects vary. We schedule at your convenience and clean up completely after installation.
home.faq4Q: Do your cameras work in the dark?
home.faq4A: Yes. Our cameras feature full-color night vision and infrared capability. Even in complete darkness, you'll have clear, identifiable footage.
home.faq5A: We serve all of Greater Houston including Sugar Land, Katy, The Woodlands, Pearland, Pasadena, Cypress, Spring, and surrounding areas within a 60-mile radius.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Protect What Matters Most?
home.ctaSub: Get a free on-site security analysis from Houston's most trusted security company.

about.heroSub: Houston's family-owned security company for over 30 years.
about.storyP1: Texas Total Security was founded in Houston in 1994 with a single mission: provide honest, expert security solutions to the families and businesses that make Houston great.
about.storyP2: Over three decades, we've protected more than 10,000 homes and businesses across Greater Houston. We've grown — but we've never lost the personal touch that makes us different from the national chains.
about.storyP3: We're a family business. When you call us, you talk to someone who knows your neighborhood, understands Houston's unique security challenges, and genuinely cares about keeping you safe.
about.value1Desc: We tell you what you need, not what makes us the most money. Honest assessments, fair prices, no upselling.
about.value2Desc: 30+ years of hands-on experience. Certified technicians. Continuous training on the latest security technology.
about.value3Desc: We live and work in Houston. Your safety is our neighborhood's safety. We're invested in this community.
about.value4Desc: We show up on time, every time. Systems that work when it counts. Monitoring that never sleeps.
about.value5Desc: No hidden fees, no confusing contracts. Clear pricing, clear terms, clear communication.
about.value6Desc: We stay current with the best technology so you don't have to. Smart home integration, AI cameras, cloud monitoring.
about.licenseText: Texas DPS Alarm License #B03066901 | Fully bonded and insured | Serving all of Greater Houston

contact.heroSub: Get a free security consultation today. We respond within 2 hours.
contact.formSub: We'll get back to you within 2 business hours.

freeAnalysis.heroSub: A licensed expert visits your property, identifies vulnerabilities, and gives you a custom security plan — completely free, no obligation.
freeAnalysis.benefit6: Covers all entry points & blind spots
freeAnalysis.formSub: Tell us a little about your property and we'll schedule your free on-site visit.
freeAnalysis.testimonial1: The analysis was eye-opening. They found vulnerabilities we never would have noticed.
freeAnalysis.testimonial2: No pressure sales. They gave us options and explained everything clearly.
freeAnalysis.ctaSub: Call us now and schedule your free analysis over the phone.
